_comment2: ACS Build-time policy: block images with critical CVEs (CVSS >= 9.0)

policies.name: DevSecOps - Block Critical CVEs (Build)
policies.description: Fails the CI build if the container image contains any CVE with CVSS score >= 9.0. This is a hard gate — no exceptions without explicit suppression.
policies.rationale: Critical vulnerabilities with CVSS >= 9.0 pose an immediate exploitation risk and must be remediated before the image can proceed through the pipeline.
policies.remediation: Update the vulnerable package to a patched version, or replace it with an alternative. If the CVE is a false positive, add it to the dependency-check suppression file (build-config/dependency-check-suppression.xml).
